languages.text: Вы распорядились отправить созданную Эоганном Триасомату служить на нижних палубах.
You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.
languages.original_text: Вы распорядились отправить созданную Эоганном Триасомату служить на нижних палубах.

traits.locale_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.
You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.
You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.

languages.text: Enviaste el triasómata creado por Eogunn a trabajar en las cubiertas inferiores.
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.

traits.locale_text: Enviaste el triasómata creado por Eogunn a trabajar en las cubiertas inferiores.

languages.text: 你将伊奥贡创造的三相体送去下层甲板服役。
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.

traits.locale_text: 你将伊奥贡创造的三相体送去下层甲板服役。

languages.text: Vous avez envoyé le Triasomata créé par Eogunn aux ponts inférieurs pour qu'il épaule l'équipage.
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez envoyé le Triasomata créé par Eogunn aux ponts inférieurs pour qu'il épaule l'équipage.

languages.text: Eogunn'un yarattığı Üçyeköz'ü alt güvertelerde hizmet vermeye gönderdin.
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn'un yarattığı Üçyeköz'ü alt güvertelerde hizmet vermeye gönderdin.

languages.text: Du hast den von Eogunn geschaffenen Triasomata zur Arbeit auf die unteren Decks geschickt.
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.

traits.locale_text: Du hast den von Eogunn geschaffenen Triasomata zur Arbeit auf die unteren Decks geschickt.

languages.text: エオグンが作ったトライアスモータを、下甲板に配属した。
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.

traits.locale_text: エオグンが作ったトライアスモータを、下甲板に配属した。
